prompts.prompt: Do NOT use polished ad layouts. This should look like organic editorial content. Create: a full-bleed moody photo of a person in a dark room lit only by multiple trading screens showing green charts, cinematic blue-green ambient light, shot on 50mm f/1.8, shallow depth of field, cinematic color grade with cool highlights and warm shadows. Lower 45% of the frame is a text overlay zone: a prominent white rounded-rectangle pill label reading "TRENDING" in centered uppercase sans-serif. Below: very large, dominant, bold all-caps condensed sans-serif headline filling the width of the frame in white text with key words in Neon Green (#A5F28C): "THIS TRADING BOT IS BLOWING UP — HERE'S WHY MANUAL TRADERS ARE SWITCHING TO AUTOMATION". The headline should be oversized — at least 35% of the total frame height. Bottom center: small white text. No product shot, no CTA button, no stars. This should read like a finance blog or tech account post, not a paid ad. 4:5 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Editorial/content card. No brand modifier — must look organic.
